description: HeyReach multi-channel outreach — Maryland DONs at OHCQ staffing-cited facilities (Clay-enriched import).
manus_instructions: 2. Copy this file to integrations/heyreach/md_don_ohcq_outreach.json and set HEYREACH_* env vars.
3. Run scripts/heyreach_build_ohcq_sequence.py --dry-run to preview copy + import CSV.
4. Import leads/heyreach_md_don_ohcq_import.csv into HeyReach (Lead Lists → Import CSV).
5. Create campaign from md_don_sequence.sequence_tree or POST UpdateSequence with generated JSON.
6. Map custom fields: county, facility_name, flag_reason, county_phrase, compliance_hook.
7. Start campaign via HeyReach UI or API (StartCampaign) after sender accounts are linked.

primary_source.description: Clay.com export — DON LinkedIn, email, phone

fallback_source.description: OHCQ citation flags when Clay export not ready (LinkedIn/email may be blank)

county_phrase.description: Insert cited county dynamically when present on the lead row.

compliance_hook.description: Tailored opener based on OHCQ/CMS staffing flag reason.

campaign.name: MD OHCQ Staffing — DON LinkedIn + Email

sequence_steps.note: HeyReach minimum actionDelay on downstream nodes is 3 hours.
Send only when don_verified_email is populated from Clay.

linkedin_connection_request.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I'm reaching out because {{facility_name}} {{county_phrase}} has been flagged for {{compliance_hook}} — and DON teams are feeling it on the floor.

VettedCare.ai instantly routes MBON-verified, active Maryland GNAs and LPNs to open shifts within 15 minutes — credentialed staff only, no compliance surprises.

Would you be open to connecting? Happy to show how we clear staffing gaps fast.

— {{sender_name}}, {{agency_name}}
linkedin_connection_request.fallback_body: Hi there — VettedCare.ai routes credentialed Maryland GNAs and LPNs to open shifts within 15 minutes. Would love to connect.

linkedin_follow_up_message.body:
Thanks for connecting, {{first_name}}.

Quick context: we work with SNF/ALF operators {{county_phrase}} who need credentialed coverage yesterday — not next week.

VettedCare.ai's compliance gate (MBON + HB 1106 + fresh license checks) means every GNA/LPN we dispatch is active and floor-ready. Most facilities see matched clinicians in under 15 minutes once a shift is posted.

If {{facility_name}} is still carrying a staffing citation or hour shortfall, I can walk your team through a same-week coverage plan.

Worth a 15-minute call this week?
linkedin_follow_up_message.fallback_body: Thanks for connecting — VettedCare.ai places MBON-verified Maryland GNAs/LPNs on open shifts within 15 minutes. Open to a quick call?

email_follow_up.subject: {{facility_name}} {{county_phrase}} — credentialed GNA/LPN coverage in 15 minutes
email_follow_up.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Following up on my LinkedIn note — I'm {{sender_name}} with {{agency_name}}.

{{facility_name}} {{county_phrase}} was flagged for {{compliance_hook}}. When survey pressure hits, the last thing your DON desk needs is unverified agency send-backs.

VettedCare.ai is built for Maryland operators under OHCQ scrutiny:

• MBON-verified GNAs & LPNs — active license, GNA endorsement where required
• Compliance sentinel blocks staff with stale credentials or missing HB 1106 consent
• Instant shift routing — matched, credentialed clinicians in ~15 minutes
• County-aware dispatch — we prioritize {{county}} coverage first

If you're clearing a staffing citation or mandated hour gap, reply with your next open shift window and I'll share a live match preview for {{facility_name}}.

— {{sender_name}}
{{agency_name}}
Maryland SNF/ALF instant staffing · MBON-gated dispatch
email_follow_up.fallback_body: Hi there — VettedCare.ai routes MBON-verified Maryland GNAs and LPNs to open shifts within 15 minutes. Reply if you'd like a coverage walkthrough.

add_leads.note: Prefer CSV import to Lead List first; use API for incremental adds.
